        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.store\n\nimport android.content.SharedPreferences\nimport androidx.core.content.edit\n\nclass SharedPreferenceProvider(private val preferences: SharedPreferences) : StoreProvider {\n    override fun getInt(key: String, defaultValue: Int): Int {\n        return preferences.getInt(key, defaultValue)\n    }\n\n    override fun setInt(key: String, value: Int) {\n        preferences.edit {\n            putInt(key, value)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getLong(key: String, defaultValue: Long): Long {\n        return preferences.getLong(key, defaultValue)\n    }\n\n    override fun setLong(key: String, value: Long) {\n        preferences.edit {\n            putLong(key, value)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getString(key: String, defaultValue: String): String {\n        return preferences.getString(key, defaultValue)!!\n    }\n\n    override fun setString(key: String, value: String) {\n        preferences.edit {\n            putString(key, value)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getStringSet(key: String, defaultValue: Set\u003cString\u003e): Set\u003cString\u003e {\n        return preferences.getStringSet(key, defaultValue)!!\n    }\n\n    override fun setStringSet(key: String, value: Set\u003cString\u003e) {\n        preferences.edit {\n            putStringSet(key, value)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getBoolean(key: String, defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean {\n        return preferences.getBoolean(key, defaultValue)\n    }\n\n    override fun setBoolean(key: String, value: Boolean) {\n        preferences.edit {\n            putBoolean(key, value)\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfun SharedPreferences.asStoreProvider(): StoreProvider {\n    return SharedPreferenceProvider(this)\n}",

        "contents": "    if update_flags.contains(UpdateFlags::LIGHT_WEIGHT) {\n        if patch.enable_auto_light_weight_mode.unwrap_or(false) {\n            lightweight::enable_auto_light_weight_mode().await;\n        } else {\n            lightweight::disable_auto_light_weight_mode();\n        }\n    }\n    if update_flags.contains(UpdateFlags::LOG_LEVEL) {\n        Logger::global().update_log_level(patch.get_log_level())?;\n    }\n    if update_flags.contains(UpdateFlags::LOG_FILE) {\n        let log_max_size = patch.app_log_max_size.unwrap_or(128);\n        let log_max_count = patch.app_log_max_count.unwrap_or(8);\n        Logger::global().update_log_config(log_max_size, log_max_count).await?;\n    }\n    Ok(())\n}\n\npub async fn patch_verge(patch: \u0026IVerge, not_save_file: bool) -\u003e Result\u003c()\u003e {\n    Config::verge().await.edit_draft(|d| d.patch_config(patch));\n\n    let update_flags = determine_update_flags(patch);\n    logging!(debug, Type::Setup, \"Determined update flags: {:?}\", update_flags);\n    let process_flag_result: std::result::Result\u003c(), anyhow::Error\u003e = {\n        process_terminated_flags(update_flags, patch).await?;\n        Ok(())\n    };\n\n    if let Err(err) = process_flag_result {\n        Config::verge().await.discard();\n        return Err(err);\n    }\n    Config::verge().await.apply();\n    logging_error!(Type::Backup, AutoBackupManager::global().refresh_settings().await);\n    if !not_save_file {\n        // 分离数据获取和异步调用\n        let verge_data = Config::verge().await.data_arc();\n        logging!(debug, Type::Setup, \"Saving Verge configuration to file...\");\n        verge_data.save_file().await?;\n    }\n    Ok(())\n}\n\npub async fn fetch_verge_config() -\u003e Result\u003cSharedDraft\u003cIVerge\u003e\u003e {\n    let draft = Config::verge().await;\n    let data = draft.data_arc();\n    Ok(data)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.content.SharedPreferences\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Authorities\nimport rikka.preference.MultiProcessPreference\nimport rikka.preference.PreferenceProvider\n\nclass PreferenceProvider : PreferenceProvider() {\n    override fun onCreatePreference(context: Context): SharedPreferences {\n        return context.getSharedPreferences(FILE_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val FILE_NAME = \"service\"\n\n        fun createSharedPreferencesFromContext(context: Context): SharedPreferences {\n            return when (context) {\n                is BaseService, is TunService -\u003e\n                    context.getSharedPreferences(\n                        FILE_NAME,\n                        Context.MODE_PRIVATE\n                    )\n                else -\u003e\n                    MultiProcessPreference(\n                        context,\n                        Authorities.SETTINGS_PROVIDER\n                    )\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.PreferenceProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.model.AccessControlMode\nimport java.util.*\n\nclass ServiceStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        PreferenceProvider\n            .createSharedPreferencesFromContext(context)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var activeProfile: UUID? by store.typedString(\n        key = \"active_profile\",\n        from = { if (it.isBlank()) null else UUID.fromString(it) },\n        to = { it?.toString() ?: \"\" }\n    )\n\n    var bypassPrivateNetwork: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"bypass_private_network\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var accessControlMode: AccessControlMode by store.enum(\n        key = \"access_control_mode\",\n        defaultValue = AccessControlMode.AcceptAll,\n        values = AccessControlMode.values()\n    )\n\n    var accessControlPackages by store.stringSet(\n        key = \"access_control_packages\",\n        defaultValue = emptySet()\n    )\n\n    var dnsHijacking by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dns_hijacking\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var systemProxy by store.boolean(\n        key = \"system_proxy\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var allowBypass by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_bypass\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var allowIpv6 by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_ipv6\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var tunStackMode by store.string(\n        key = \"tun_stack_mode\",\n        defaultValue = \"mixed\"\n    )\n\n    var dynamicNotification by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dynamic_notification\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.ProxySort\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfoSort\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.DarkMode\n\nclass UiStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        context\n            .getSharedPreferences(PREFERENCE_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var enableVpn: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"enable_vpn\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var darkMode: DarkMode by store.enum(\n        key = \"dark_mode\",\n        defaultValue = DarkMode.Auto,\n        values = DarkMode.values()\n    )\n\n    var hideAppIcon: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"hide_app_icon\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var proxyExcludeNotSelectable by store.boolean(\n        key = \"proxy_exclude_not_selectable\",\n        defaultValue = false,\n    )\n\n    var proxyLine: Int by store.int(\n        key = \"proxy_line\",\n        defaultValue = 3\n    )\n\n    var proxySort: ProxySort by store.enum(\n        key = \"proxy_sort\",\n        defaultValue = ProxySort.Default,\n        values = ProxySort.values()\n    )\n\n    var proxyLastGroup: String by store.string(\n        key = \"proxy_last_group\",\n        defaultValue = \"\"\n    )\n\n    var accessControlSort: AppInfoSort by store.enum(\n        key = \"access_control_sort\",\n        defaultValue = AppInfoSort.Label,\n        values = AppInfoSort.values(),\n    )\n\n    var accessControlReverse: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"access_control_reverse\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var accessControlSystemApp: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"access_control_system_app\",\n        defaultValue = false,\n    )\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val PREFERENCE_NAME = \"ui\"\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@file:UseSerializers(DateSerializer::class)\n\npackage com.github.kr328.clash.core.model\n\nimport android.os.Parcel\nimport android.os.Parcelable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.DateSerializer\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.Parcelizer\nimport kotlinx.serialization.SerialName\nimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable\nimport kotlinx.serialization.UseSerializers\nimport java.util.*\n\n@Serializable\ndata class LogMessage(\n    val level: Level,\n    val message: String,\n    val time: Date,\n) : Parcelable {\n    @Serializable\n    enum class Level {\n        @SerialName(\"debug\")\n        Debug,\n        @SerialName(\"info\")\n        Info,\n        @SerialName(\"warning\")\n        Warning,\n        @SerialName(\"error\")\n        Error,\n        @SerialName(\"silent\")\n        Silent,\n        @SerialName(\"unknown\")\n        Unknown,\n    }\n\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int {\n        return 0\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        @JvmField\n        val CREATOR = object : Parcelable.Creator\u003cLogMessage\u003e {\n            override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): LogMessage {\n                return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n            }\n\n            override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cLogMessage?\u003e {\n                return arrayOfNulls(size)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        patch!(clash_core);\n        patch!(hotkeys);\n        patch!(enable_global_hotkey);\n\n        patch!(auto_close_connection);\n        patch!(auto_check_update);\n        patch!(default_latency_test);\n        patch!(enable_auto_delay_detection);\n        patch!(auto_delay_detection_interval_minutes);\n        patch!(enable_builtin_enhanced);\n        patch!(proxy_layout_column);\n        patch!(test_list);\n        patch!(auto_log_clean);\n        patch!(enable_auto_backup_schedule);\n        patch!(auto_backup_interval_hours);\n        patch!(auto_backup_on_change);\n\n        patch!(webdav_url);\n        patch!(webdav_username);\n        patch!(webdav_password);\n        patch!(enable_tray_speed);\n        // patch!(enable_tray_icon);\n        patch!(tray_proxy_groups_display_mode);\n        patch!(tray_inline_outbound_modes);\n        patch!(enable_auto_light_weight_mode);\n        patch!(auto_light_weight_minutes);\n        patch!(enable_dns_settings);\n        patch!(home_cards);\n        patch!(enable_external_controller);\n    }\n\n    pub const fn get_singleton_port() -\u003e u16 {\n        crate::constants::network::ports::SINGLETON_SERVER\n    }\n\n    /// 获取日志等级\n    pub fn get_log_level(\u0026self) -\u003e LevelFilter {\n        if let Some(level) = self.app_log_level.as_ref() {\n            match level.to_lowercase().as_str() {\n                \"silent\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Off,\n                \"error\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Error,\n                \"warn\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Warn,\n                \"info\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Info,\n                \"debug\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Debug,\n                \"trace\" =\u003e LevelFilter::Trace,\n                _ =\u003e LevelFilter::Info,\n            }\n        } else {\n            LevelFilter::Info\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    fn generate_log_spec(log_level: LevelFilter) -\u003e LogSpecification {\n        let mut spec = LogSpecBuilder::new();\n        let log_level = std::env::var(\"RUST_LOG\")\n            .ok()\n            .and_then(|v| log::LevelFilter::from_str(\u0026v).ok())\n            .unwrap_or(log_level);\n        spec.default(log_level);\n        #[cfg(feature = \"tracing\")]\n        spec.module(\"tauri\", log::LevelFilter::Debug)\n            .module(\"wry\", log::LevelFilter::Off)\n            .module(\"tauri_plugin_mihomo\", log::LevelFilter::Off);\n        spec.build()\n    }\n\n    fn generate_file_log_writer(\u0026self) -\u003e Result\u003cFileLogWriterBuilder\u003e {\n        let log_dir = dirs::app_logs_dir()?;\n        let log_max_size = self.log_max_size.load(Ordering::SeqCst);\n        let log_max_count = self.log_max_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst);\n        let flwb = FileLogWriter::builder(FileSpec::default().directory(log_dir).basename(\"\")).rotate(\n            Criterion::Size(log_max_size * 1024),\n            flexi_logger::Naming::TimestampsCustomFormat {\n                current_infix: Some(\"latest\"),\n                format: \"%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S\",\n            },\n            Cleanup::KeepLogFiles(log_max_count),\n        );\n        Ok(flwb)\n    }\n\n    /// only update app log level\n    pub fn update_log_level(\u0026self, level: LevelFilter) -\u003e Result\u003c()\u003e {\n        *self.log_level.write() = level;\n        let log_level = self.log_level.read().to_owned();\n        if let Some(handle) = self.handle.lock().as_mut() {\n            let log_spec = Self::generate_log_spec(log_level);\n            handle.set_new_spec(log_spec);\n            handle.adapt_duplication_to_stdout(log_level.into())?;\n        } else {\n            bail!(\"failed to get logger handle, make sure it init\");\n        };\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// update app and mihomo core log config\n    pub async fn update_log_config(\u0026self, log_max_size: u64, log_max_count: usize) -\u003e Result\u003c()\u003e {\n        self.log_max_size.store(log_max_size, Ordering::SeqCst);\n        self.log_max_count.store",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.store\n\ninterface StoreProvider {\n    fun getInt(key: String, defaultValue: Int): Int\n    fun setInt(key: String, value: Int)\n\n    fun getLong(key: String, defaultValue: Long): Long\n    fun setLong(key: String, value: Long)\n\n    fun getString(key: String, defaultValue: String): String\n    fun setString(key: String, value: String)\n\n    fun getStringSet(key: String, defaultValue: Set\u003cString\u003e): Set\u003cString\u003e\n    fun setStringSet(key: String, value: Set\u003cString\u003e)\n\n    fun getBoolean(key: String, defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean\n    fun setBoolean(key: String, value: Boolean)\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        Event.ActivityStart -\u003e {\n                            val files = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n                                loadFiles()\n                            }\n\n                            design.patchLogs(files)\n                        }\n                        else -\u003e Unit\n                    }\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        is LogsDesign.Request.ChangeLogLevel -\u003e {\n                            withClash {\n                                val o = queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session)\n                                o.logLevel = it.level\n                                patchOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session, o)\n                            }\n                        }\n                        LogsDesign.Request.StartLogcat -\u003e {\n                            startActivity(LogcatActivity::class.intent)\n                            finish()\n                        }\n                        LogsDesign.Request.DeleteAll -\u003e {\n                            if (design.requestDeleteAll()) {\n                                withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n                                    deleteAllLogs()\n                                }\n\n                                events.trySend(Event.ActivityStart)\n                            }\n                        }\n                        is LogsDesign.Request.OpenFile -\u003e {\n                            startActivity(LogcatActivity::class.intent.setFileName(it.file.fileName))\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun loadFiles(): List\u003cLogFile\u003e {\n        val list = cacheDir.resolve(\"logs\").listFiles()?.toList() ?: emptyList()\n\n        return list.mapNotNull { LogFile.parseFromFileName(it.name) }\n    }\n\n    private fun deleteAllLogs() {\n        logsDir.deleteRecursively()\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\n\nclass TipsStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        context\n            .getSharedPreferences(FILE_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var requestDonate: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"request_donate\",\n        defaultValue = true,\n    )\n\n    var primaryVersion: Int by store.int(\n        key = \"primary_version\",\n        defaultValue = -1,\n    )\n\n    companion object {\n        const val CURRENT_PRIMARY_VERSION = 1\n\n        private const val FILE_NAME = \"tips\"\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.store\n\nimport kotlin.reflect.KProperty\n\nclass Store(val provider: StoreProvider) {\n    interface Delegate\u003cT\u003e {\n        operator fun getValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e): T\n        operator fun setValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e, value: T)\n    }\n\n    fun int(key: String, defaultValue: Int): Delegate\u003cInt\u003e {\n        return object : Delegate\u003cInt\u003e {\n            override fun getValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e): Int {\n                return provider.getInt(key, defaultValue)\n            }\n\n            override fun setValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e, value: Int) {\n                provider.setInt(key, value)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun long(key: String, defaultValue: Long): Delegate\u003cLong\u003e {\n        return object : Delegate\u003cLong\u003e {\n            override fun getValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e): Long {\n                return provider.getLong(key, defaultValue)\n            }\n\n            override fun setValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e, value: Long) {\n                provider.setLong(key, value)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun string(key: String, defaultValue: String): Delegate\u003cString\u003e {\n        return object : Delegate\u003cString\u003e {\n            override fun getValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e): String {\n                return provider.getString(key, defaultValue)\n            }\n\n            override fun setValue(thisRef: Any?, property: KProperty\u003c*\u003e, value: String) {\n                provider.setString(key, value)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun stringSet(key: String, defaultValue: Set\u003cString\u003e): Delegate\u003cSet\u003cString\u003e\u003e {\n        return object : Delegate\u003cSet\u003cString\u003e\u003e {\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "use crate::config::Config;\nuse crate::{\n    config::{DEFAULT_PAC, deserialize_encrypted, serialize_encrypted},\n    utils::{dirs, help},\n};\nuse anyhow::Result;\nuse clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging};\nuse log::LevelFilter;\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse smartstring::alias::String;\n\n/// ### &#96;verge.yaml&#96; schema\n#[derive(Default, Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]\npub struct IVerge {\n    /// app log level\n    /// silent | error | warn | info | debug | trace\n    pub app_log_level: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// app log max size in KB\n    pub app_log_max_size: Option\u003cu64\u003e,\n\n    /// app log max count\n    pub app_log_max_count: Option\u003cusize\u003e,\n\n    // i18n\n    pub language: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// &#96;light&#96; or &#96;dark&#96; or &#96;system&#96;\n    pub theme_mode: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// tray click event\n    pub tray_event: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// copy env type\n    pub env_type: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// start page\n    pub start_page: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n    /// startup script path\n    pub startup_script: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// enable traffic graph default is true\n    pub traffic_graph: Option\u003cbool\u003e,\n\n    /// show memory info (only for Clash Meta)\n    pub enable_memory_usage: Option\u003cbool\u003e,\n\n    /// enable group icon\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub enable_group_icon: Option\u003cbool\u003e,\n\n    /// common tray icon\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub common_tray_icon: Option\u003cbool\u003e,\n\n    /// tray icon\n    #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub tray_icon: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// menu icon\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub menu_icon: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// menu order\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub menu_order: Option\u003cVec\u003cString\u003e\u003e,\n\n    /// toast / notice position on screen\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub notice_position: Option\u003cString\u003e,\n\n    /// collapse navigation bar\n    pub collapse_navbar: Option\u003cbool\u003e,\n\n    /// sysproxy tray icon",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"os\"\n\tP \"path\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/hub\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nfunc UnmarshalAndPatch(profilePath string) (*config.RawConfig, error) {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(profilePath, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tconfigData, err := os.ReadFile(configPath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\trawConfig, err := config.UnmarshalRawConfig(configData)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := process(rawConfig, profilePath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rawConfig, nil\n}\n\nfunc Parse(rawConfig *config.RawConfig) (*config.Config, error) {\n\tcfg, err := config.ParseRawConfig(rawConfig)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn cfg, nil\n}\n\nfunc Load(path string) error {\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Errorln(\"Load %s: %s\", path, err.Error())\n\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Errorln(\"Load %s: %s\", path, err.Error())\n\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// like hub.Parse()\n\thub.ApplyConfig(cfg)\n\n\tapplyProxySelectionsFromOverride()\n\n\tapp.ApplySubtitlePattern(rawCfg.ClashForAndroid.UiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\truntime.GC()\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\ntype persistProxySelections struct {\n\tProxySelections map[string]string &#96;json:\"proxy-selections\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc applyProxySelectionsFromOverride() {\n\traw := ReadOverride(OverrideSlotPersist)\n\tvar o persistProxySelections\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(raw), \u0026o); err != nil || o.ProxySelections == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tfor group, name := range o.ProxySelections {\n\t\ttunnel.PatchSelector(group, name)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc LoadDefault() {\n\tcfg, err := config.Parse([]byte{})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\thub.ApplyConfig(cfg)\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const MiscViewer = (props, ref) =\u003e {\n() =\u003e (\n\n    close: () =\u003e setOpen(false),\n  }));\n\n  const onSave = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      await patchVerge({\n        app_log_level: values.appLogLevel,\n        app_log_max_size: values.appLogMaxSize,\n        app_log_max_count: values.appLogMaxCount,\n        auto_close_connection: values.autoCloseConnection,\n        auto_check_update: values.autoCheckUpdate,\n        enable_builtin_enhanced: values.enableBuiltinEnhanced,\n        proxy_layout_column: values.proxyLayoutColumn,\n        enable_auto_delay_detection: values.enableAutoDelayDetection,\n        auto_delay_detection_interval_minutes:\n          values.autoDelayDetectionIntervalMinutes,\n        auto_log_clean: values.autoLogClean as any,\n      });\n      setOpen(false);\n    } catch (err) {\n      showNotice.error(err);\n    }\n  });\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBaseDialog\n      open={open}\n      title={t(\"settings.modals.misc.title\")}\n      contentSx={{ width: 450 }}\n      okBtn={t(\"shared.actions.save\")}\n      cancelBtn={t(\"shared.actions.cancel\")}\n      onClose={() =\u003e setOpen(false)}\n      onCancel={() =\u003e setOpen(false)}\n      onOk={onSave}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cList\u003e\n        \u003cListItem sx={{ padding: \"5px 2px\" }}\u003e\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "return cache.snapshot(full)\n    }\n\n    private fun startObserver(binder: IBinder) {\n        if (!binder.isBinderAlive)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        launch(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            val service = binder.unwrap(IRemoteService::class).clash()\n            val channel = Channel\u003cLogMessage\u003e(CACHE_CAPACITY)\n\n            try {\n                logsDir.mkdirs()\n\n                LogcatWriter(this@LogcatService).use {\n                    val observer = object : ILogObserver {\n                        override fun newItem(log: LogMessage) {\n                            channel.trySend(log)\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    service.setLogObserver(observer)\n\n                    while (isActive) {\n                        val msg = channel.receive()\n\n                        it.appendMessage(msg)\n\n                        cache.append(msg)\n                    }\n                }\n            } catch (e: IOException) {\n                Log.e(\"Write log file: $e\", e)\n            } finally {\n                withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                    if (binder.isBinderAlive) {\n                        service.setLogObserver(null)\n                    }\n\n                    stopSelf()\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun createNotificationChannel() {\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(this)\n            .createNotificationChannel(\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    CHANNEL_ID,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT\n                ).setName(getString(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.string.clash_logcat)).build()\n            )\n    }\n\n    private fun showNotification() {\n        val notification = NotificationCompat\n            .Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.log\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.LogMessage\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.LogFile\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.logsDir\nimport java.io.BufferedWriter\nimport java.io.FileWriter\n\nclass LogcatWriter(context: Context) : AutoCloseable {\n    private val file = LogFile.generate()\n    private val writer = BufferedWriter(FileWriter(context.logsDir.resolve(file.fileName)))\n\n    override fun close() {\n        writer.close()\n    }\n\n    fun appendMessage(message: LogMessage) {\n        writer.appendLine(FORMAT.format(message.time.time, message.level.name, message.message))\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val FORMAT = \"%d:%s:%s\"\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ConnectionItem = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { value, closed, onShowDetail } = props;\n\n  const { id, metadata, chains, start, curUpload, curDownload } = value;\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const onDelete = useLockFn(async () =\u003e closeConnection(id));\n  const showTraffic = curUpload! \u003e= 100 || curDownload! \u003e= 100;\n\n  return (\n    \u003cListItem\n      dense\n      sx={{ borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--divider-color)\" }}\n      secondaryAction={\n        !closed \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cIconButton\n            edge=\"end\"\n            color=\"inherit\"\n            onClick={onDelete}\n            title={t(\"connections.components.actions.closeConnection\")}\n            aria-label={t(\"connections.components.actions.closeConnection\")}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cCloseRounded /\u003e\n          \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n        )\n      }\n    \u003e\n      \u003cListItemText\n        sx={{ userSelect: \"text\", cursor: \"pointer\" }}\n        primary={metadata.host || metadata.destinationIP}\n        onClick={onShowDetail}\n        secondary={\n          \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", flexWrap: \"wrap\" }}\u003e\n            \u003cTag sx={{ textTransform: \"uppercase\", color: \"success\" }}\u003e\n              {metadata.network}\n            \u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            \u003cTag\u003e{metadata.type}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            {!!metadata.process \u0026\u0026 \u003cTag\u003e{metadata.process}\u003c/Tag\u003e}\n\n            {chains?.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cTag\u003e{[...chains].reverse().join(\" / \")}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n            )}\n\n            \u003cTag\u003e{dayjs(start).fromNow()}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            {showTraffic \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cTag\u003e\n                {parseTraffic(curUpload!)} / {parseTraffic(curDownload!)}\n              \u003c/Tag\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        }\n      /\u003e\n    \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const getConnectionCellValue = (field: ColumnField, each: IConnectionsItem) =\u003e {\n  const { metadata, rulePayload, ruleDetail } = each;\n\n  switch (field) {\n    case \"host\":\n      return metadata.host\n        ? &#96;${metadata.host}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n        : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n    case \"download\":\n      return each.download;\n    case \"upload\":\n      return each.upload;\n    case \"dlSpeed\":\n      return each.curDownload;\n    case \"ulSpeed\":\n      return each.curUpload;\n    case \"chains\":\n      return [...each.chains].reverse().join(\" / \");\n    case \"rule\":\n      if (rulePayload) {\n        return ruleDetail ? &#96;${rulePayload} --\u003e [${ruleDetail}]&#96; : rulePayload;\n      }\n      return each.rule;\n    case \"process\":\n      return truncateStr(metadata.process || metadata.processPath);\n    case \"time\":\n      return each.start;\n    case \"source\":\n      return &#96;${metadata.sourceIP}:${metadata.sourcePort}&#96;;\n    case \"remoteDestination\":\n      return metadata.destinationIP\n        ? &#96;${metadata.destinationIP}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n        : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n    case \"type\":\n      return &#96;${metadata.type}(${metadata.network})&#96;;\n    default:\n      return \"\";\n  }\n};\n\ninterface Props {\n  connections: IConnectionsItem[];\n;\n}",

        "contents": "        )\n    }\n\n    override fun onBindViewHolder(holder: Holder, position: Int) {\n        val item = displayItems[position]\n        val conn = item.connection\n        holder.binding.connection = conn\n        holder.binding.trafficDisplayText = item.trafficDisplayText\n        holder.binding.trafficDisplayView.visibility = View.VISIBLE\n        holder.binding.startTimeDisplayText = item.startTimeDisplayText\n        val ruleText = formatRuleDisplay(conn)\n        holder.binding.ruleDisplayText = ruleText\n        holder.binding.ruleDisplayView.visibility = if (ruleText.isNotEmpty()) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE\n        val processView = holder.binding.processView\n        val process = conn.metadata?.process?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }\n        processView.text = process\n        processView.visibility = if (process != null) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE\n        val iconView = holder.binding.appIconView\n        if (process != null) {\n            try {\n                iconView.setImageDrawable(context.packageManager.getApplicationIcon(process))\n                iconView.visibility = View.VISIBLE\n            } catch (_: Exception) {\n                iconView.visibility = View.GONE\n            }\n        } else {\n            iconView.visibility = View.GONE\n        }\n        holder.binding.closeView.setOnClickListener { onClose(conn) }\n        holder.binding.root.setOnLongClickListener {\n            onCopy?.invoke(conn, formatRuleDisplay(conn))\n            true\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getItemCount(): Int = displayItems.size\n\n    private fun formatRuleDisplay(conn: Connection): String {\n        return buildString {\n            append(conn.chains)\n            if (conn.rule.isNotEmpty()) {\n                append(\" --\u003e [\")\n                append(ruleDisplayName(conn))\n                if (conn.ruleDetail.isNotEmpty()) append(\",\").append(conn.ruleDetail)\n                append(\"]\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /** For RuleSet, show rulePayload (e.g. proxy, cn) instead of generic \"RuleSet\". */\n    private fun ruleDisplayName(conn: Connection): String {\n        ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ConnectionTable = \n\n\n  const baseColumns = useMemo\u003cBaseColumn[]\u003e(() =\u003e {\n    return [\n      {\n        field: \"host\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.host\"),\n        width: 180,\n        minWidth: 140,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"download\",\n        headerName: t(\"shared.labels.downloaded\"),\n        width: 76,\n        minWidth: 60,\n        align: \"right\",\n        cell: (row) =\u003e parseTraffic(row.download).join(\" \"),\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"upload\",\n        headerName: t(\"shared.labels.uploaded\"),\n        width: 76,\n        minWidth: 60,\n        align: \"right\",\n        cell: (row) =\u003e parseTraffic(row.upload).join(\" \"),\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"dlSpeed\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.dlSpeed\"),\n        width: 76,\n        minWidth: 60,\n        align: \"right\",\n        cell: (row) =\u003e &#96;${parseTraffic(row.curDownload).join(\" \")}/s&#96;,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"ulSpeed\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.ulSpeed\"),\n        width: 76,\n        minWidth: 60,\n        align: \"right\",\n        cell: (row) =\u003e &#96;${parseTraffic(row.curUpload).join(\" \")}/s&#96;,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"chains\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.chains\"),\n        width: 280,\n        minWidth: 160,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"rule\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.rule\"),\n        width: 220,\n        minWidth: 160,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"process\",\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "suspend fun patchConnections(snapshot: ConnectionsSnapshot) {\n        lastSnapshot = snapshot\n        val sorted = snapshot.connections.sortedBy { it.start }.let { list -\u003e\n            if (sortNewestFirst) list.asReversed() else list\n        }\n        val nowMs = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        val intervalSec = if (previousTimeMs \u003e 0) (nowMs - previousTimeMs) / 1000.0 else 1.0\n        val intervalSecClamped = if (intervalSec \u003c 0.5) 1.0 else intervalSec\n\n        val displayItems = sorted.map { conn -\u003e\n            val prev = previousTraffic[conn.id]\n            val downloadSpeedBps = if (prev != null) {\n                ((conn.download - prev.second) / intervalSecClamped).toLong().coerceAtLeast(0)\n            } else 0L\n            val trafficLine = \"↓ ${conn.download.toBytesString()} (${downloadSpeedBps.toSpeedString()})\"\n            val startTimeText = conn.start.formatConnectionStartTime()\n            ConnectionDisplayItem(conn, trafficLine, startTimeText)\n        }\n\n        previousTraffic = snapshot.connections.associate { it.id to (it.upload to it.download) }\n        previousTimeMs = nowMs\n\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::displayItems, displayItems, detectMove = true) { it.connection.id }\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n        binding.recyclerList.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter)\n        binding.sortOrderView.setOnClickListener { toggleSortOrder() }\n    }\n\n    private fun toggleSortOrder() {\n        sortNewestFirst = !sortNewestFirst\n        lastSnapshot?.let { snapshot -\u003e\n            launch {\n                patchConnections(snapshot)\n                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n                    binding.recyclerList.scrollToPosition(0)\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.core.model\n\nimport android.os.Parcel\nimport android.os.Parcelable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.Parcelizer\nimport kotlinx.serialization.SerialName\nimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable\n\n@Serializable\ndata class ConnectionsSnapshot(\n    val downloadTotal: Long = 0,\n    val uploadTotal: Long = 0,\n    val connections: List\u003cConnection\u003e = emptyList(),\n) : Parcelable {\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int = 0\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cConnectionsSnapshot\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): ConnectionsSnapshot {\n            return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n        }\n\n        override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cConnectionsSnapshot?\u003e = arrayOfNulls(size)\n    }\n}\n\n@Serializable\ndata class Connection(\n    val id: String,\n    val metadata: ConnectionMetadata? = null,\n    val upload: Long = 0,\n    val download: Long = 0,\n    val start: String = \"\",\n    val chains: String = \"\",\n    @SerialName(\"providerChains\") val providerChains: String = \"\",\n    val rule: String = \"\",\n    val rulePayload: String = \"\",\n    val ruleDetail: String = \"\",\n) : Parcelable {\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int = 0\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cConnection\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): Connection {\n            return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n        }\n\n        override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cConnection?\u003e = arrayOfNulls(size)\n    }\n}\n\n@Serializable\ndata class ConnectionMetadata(\n    val network: String = \"\",\n    val host: String = \"\",",

        "contents": "const InnerConnectionDetail = ({ data, closed, onClose }: InnerProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { metadata, rulePayload, ruleDetail } = data;\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const chains = [...data.chains].reverse().join(\" / \");\n  const rule = rulePayload\n    ? ruleDetail\n      ? &#96;${rulePayload} --\u003e [${ruleDetail}]&#96;\n      : rulePayload\n    : data.rule;\n  const host = metadata.host\n    ? &#96;${metadata.host}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n    : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n  const Destination = metadata.destinationIP\n    ? metadata.destinationIP\n    : metadata.remoteDestination;\n\n  const information = [\n    { label: t(\"connections.components.fields.host\"), value: host },\n    {\n      label: t(\"shared.labels.downloaded\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.download).join(\" \"),\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"shared.labels.uploaded\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.upload).join(\" \"),\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.dlSpeed\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.curDownload ??         "contents": "export const ConnectionTable = \nconst baseColumns = () =\u003e {\n,\n        minWidth: 160,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"process\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.process\"),\n        width: 180,\n        minWidth: 140,\n        cell: (row) =\u003e (\n          \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 0.75 }}\u003e\n            \u003cProcessIcon processPath={row.metadata.processPath} size={16} /\u003e\n            \u003cspan\n              style={{\n                overflow: \"hidden\",\n                textOverflow: \"ellipsis\",\n                whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              {row.metadata.process}\n            \u003c/span\u003e\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        ),\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"time\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.time\"),\n        width: 100,\n        minWidth: 80,\n        align: \"right\",\n        // cell filled later with shared relativeNow ticker\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"source\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.source\"),\n        width: 160,\n        minWidth: 120,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"remoteDestination\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.destination\"),\n        width: 160,\n        minWidth: 120,\n      },\n      {\n        field: \"type\",\n        headerName: t(\"connections.components.fields.type\"),\n        width: 120,\n        minWidth: 80,\n      },\n    ];\n  }, [t]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setColumnOrder((prevValue) =\u003e {\n      const baseFields = baseColumns.map((col) =\u003e col.field);\n      const prev = Array.isArray(prevValue) ? prevValue : [];\n      const reconciled = reconcileColumnOrder(prev, baseFields);\n      if (\n        reconciled.length === prev.length \u0026\u0026\n        reconciled.every((field, i) =\u003e field === prev[i])\n      ) {\n        return prevValue;\n      }\n      return reconciled;\n    });\n  }, [baseColumns, setColumnOrder]);\n\n  const handleColumnVisibilityChange = useCallback\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ConnectionsPage = \n (\n          \u003cBaseStyledSelect\n            value={curOrderOpt}\n            onChange={(e) =\u003e setCurOrderOpt(e.target.value as OrderKey)}\n          \u003e\n            {ORDER_OPTIONS.map((option) =\u003e (\n              \u003cMenuItem key={option.id} value={option.id}\u003e\n                \u003cspan style={{ fontSize: 14 }}\u003e{t(option.labelKey)}\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/MenuItem\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/BaseStyledSelect\u003e\n        )}\n        \u003cBox\n          sx={{\n            flex: 1,\n            display: \"flex\",\n            alignItems: \"center\",\n            \"\u0026 \u003e *\": {\n              flex: 1,\n            },\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          \u003cBaseSearchBox onSearch={handleSearch} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n      {!hasTableData ?       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { Box, IconButton, Tooltip } from \"@mui/material\";\nimport type { Column } from \"@tanstack/react-table\";\nimport {\n  ColumnDef,\n  ColumnOrderState,\n  ColumnSizingState,\n  flexRender,\n  getCoreRowModel,\n  getSortedRowModel,\n  SortingState,\n  Updater,\n  useReactTable,\n  VisibilityState,\n} from \"@tanstack/react-table\";\nimport { useVirtualizer } from \"@tanstack/react-virtual\";\nimport dayjs from \"dayjs\";\nimport { useLocalStorage } from \"foxact/use-local-storage\";\nimport {\n  useCallback,\n  useEffect,\n  useMemo,\n  useRef,\n  useState,\n  type ReactNode,\n} from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\n\nimport parseTraffic from \"@/utils/parse-traffic\";\nimport { truncateStr } from \"@/utils/truncate-str\";\n\nimport { ConnectionColumnManager } from \"./connection-column-manager\";\nimport { ProcessIcon } from \"./process-icon\";\n\nconst ROW_HEIGHT = 40;\n\n/**\n * Reconcile stored column order with base columns to handle added/removed fields\n */\nconst reconcileColumnOrder = (\n  storedOrder: string[],\n  baseFields: string[],\n): string[] =\u003e {\n  const filtered = storedOrder.filter((field) =\u003e baseFields.includes(field));\n  const missing = baseFields.filter((field) =\u003e !filtered.includes(field));\n  return [...filtered, ...missing];\n};\n\ntype ColumnField =\n  | \"host\"\n  | \"download\"\n  | \"upload\"\n  | \"dlSpeed\"\n  | \"ulSpeed\"\n  | \"chains\"\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\nimport (\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel/statistic\"\n)\n\n// connectionDTO is JSON-serializable (atomic types copied to int64, etc.)\ntype connectionDTO struct {\n\tId            string       &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tMetadata      *metadataDTO &#96;json:\"metadata\"&#96;\n\tUpload        int64        &#96;json:\"upload\"&#96;\n\tDownload      int64        &#96;json:\"download\"&#96;\n\tStart         string       &#96;json:\"start\"&#96;\n\tChains        string       &#96;json:\"chains\"&#96;\n\tProviderChains string      &#96;json:\"providerChains,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRule          string       &#96;json:\"rule\"&#96;\n\tRulePayload   string       &#96;json:\"rulePayload\"&#96;\n\tRuleDetail    string       &#96;json:\"ruleDetail,omitempty\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype metadataDTO struct {\n\tNetwork  string &#96;json:\"network\"&#96;\n\tHost     string &#96;json:\"host\"&#96;\n\tProcess  string &#96;json:\"process\"&#96;\n\tSourceIP string &#96;json:\"sourceIP\"&#96;\n\tDstPort  uint16 &#96;json:\"destinationPort,string\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype connectionsSnapshotDTO struct {\n\tDownloadTotal int64           &#96;json:\"downloadTotal\"&#96;\n\tUploadTotal   int64           &#96;json:\"uploadTotal\"&#96;\n\tConnections   []connectionDTO &#96;json:\"connections\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc queryConnectionsSnapshot() *connectionsSnapshotDTO",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func queryConnectionsSnapshot() *connectionsSnapshotDTO {\n\tsnap := statistic.DefaultManager.Snapshot()\n\tif snap == nil {\n\t\treturn \u0026connectionsSnapshotDTO{Connections: []connectionDTO{}}\n\t}\n\tout := \u0026connectionsSnapshotDTO{\n\t\tDownloadTotal: snap.DownloadTotal,\n\t\tUploadTotal:   snap.UploadTotal,\n\t\tConnections:   make([]connectionDTO, 0, len(snap.Connections)),\n\t}\n\tfor _, info := range snap.Connections {\n\t\tif info == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tdto := connectionDTO{\n\t\t\tId:          info.UUID.String(),\n\t\t\tUpload:      info.UploadTotal.Load(),\n\t\t\tDownload:    info.DownloadTotal.Load(),\n\t\t\tStart:       info.Start.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t\tChains:      info.Chain.String(),\n\t\t\tRule:        info.Rule,\n\t\t\tRulePayload: info.RulePayload,\n\t\t\tRuleDetail:  info.RuleDetail,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(info.ProviderChain) \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\tdto.ProviderChains = info.ProviderChain.String()\n\t\t}\n\t\tif info.Metadata != nil {\n\t\t\tm := info.Metadata\n\t\t\tdto.Metadata = \u0026metadataDTO{\n\t\t\t\tNetwork:  m.NetWork.String(),\n\t\t\t\tHost:     m.Host,\n\t\t\t\tProcess:  m.Process,\n\t\t\t\tSourceIP: m.SrcIP.String(),\n\t\t\t\tDstPort:  m.DstPort,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tout.Connections = append(out.Connections, dto)\n\t}\n\treturn out\n}\n\nfunc closeConnectionByID(id string) bool {\n\tc := statistic.DefaultManager.Get(id)\n\tif c == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\t_ = c.Close()\n\treturn true\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ConnectionTable = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const {\n    connections,\n    onShowDetail,\n    columnManagerOpen,\n    onOpenColumnManager,\n    onCloseColumnManager,\n  } = props;\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const [columnWidths, setColumnWidths] = useLocalStorage\u003cColumnSizingState\u003e(\n    \"connection-table-widths\",\n    // server-side value, this is the default value used by server-side rendering (if any)\n    // Do not omit (otherwise a Suspense boundary will be triggered)\n    {},\n  );\n\n  const [columnVisibilityModel, setColumnVisibilityModel] =\n    useLocalStorage\u003cVisibilityState\u003e(\n      \"connection-table-visibility\",\n      {},\n      {\n        serializer: JSON.stringify,\n        deserializer: (value) =\u003e {\n          try {\n            const parsed = JSON.parse(value);\n            if (parsed \u0026\u0026 typeof parsed === \"object\") return parsed;\n          } catch (err) {\n            console.warn(\"Failed to parse connection-table-visibility\", err);\n          }\n          return {};\n        },\n      },\n    );\n\n  const [columnOrder, setColumnOrder] = useLocalStorage\u003cstring[]\u003e(\n    \"connection-table-order\",\n    [],\n    {\n      serializer: JSON.stringify,\n      deserializer: (value) =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const parsed = JSON.parse(value);\n          if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed;\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.warn(\"Failed to parse connection-table-order\", err);\n        }\n        return [];\n      },\n    },\n  );\n\n  interface BaseColumn {\n    field: ColumnField;\n    headerName: string;\n    width?: number;\n    minWidth?: number;\n    align?: \"left\" | \"right\";\n    cell?: (row: IConnectionsItem) =\u003e ReactNode;\n  }\n\n  const baseColumns = useMemo\u003cBaseColumn[]\u003e\n;\n;",

        "contents": "import {\n  styled,\n  ListItem,\n  IconButton,\n  ListItemText,\n  Box,\n  alpha,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useLockFn } from \"ahooks\";\nimport dayjs from \"dayjs\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport { closeConnection } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport parseTraffic from \"@/utils/parse-traffic\";\n\nconst Tag = styled(\"span\")(({ theme }) =\u003e ({\n  fontSize: \"10px\",\n  padding: \"0 4px\",\n  lineHeight: 1.375,\n  border: \"1px solid\",\n  borderRadius: 4,\n  borderColor: alpha(theme.palette.text.secondary, 0.35),\n  marginTop: \"4px\",\n  marginRight: \"4px\",\n}));\n\ninterface Props {\n  value: IConnectionsItem;\n  closed: boolean;\n  onShowDetail?: () =\u003e void;\n}\n\nexport const ConnectionItem = (props: Props) =\u003e\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\nabstract class BaseActivity\u003cD : Design\u003c*\u003e\u003e : AppCompatActivity(),\n    CoroutineScope by MainScope(),\n    Broadcasts.Observer {\n    \n    protected val uiStore by lazy { UiStore(this) }\n    protected val events = Channel\u003cEvent\u003e(Channel.UNLIMITED)\n    protected var activityStarted: Boolean = false\n    protected val clashRunning: Boolean\n        get() = Remote.broadcasts.clashRunning\n    protected var design: D? = null\n        set(value) {\n            field = value\n            if (value != null) {\n                setContentView(value.root)\n            } else {\n                setContentView(View(this))\n            }\n        }\n\n    private var defer: suspend () -\u003e Unit = {}\n    private var deferRunning = false\n    private val nextRequestKey = AtomicInteger(0)\n    private var dayNight: DayNight = DayNight.Day\n\n    protected abstract suspend fun main()\n\n    fun defer(operation: suspend () -\u003e Unit) {\n        this.defer = operation\n    }\n\n    suspend fun \u003cI, O\u003e startActivityForResult(\n        contracts: ActivityResultContract\u003cI, O\u003e,\n        input: I,\n    ): O = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n        val requestKey = nextRequestKey.getAndIncrement().toString()\n\n        ActivityResultLifecycle().use { lifecycle, start -\u003e\n            suspendCoroutine { c -\u003e\n                activityResultRegistry.register(requestKey, lifecycle, contracts) {\n                    c.resume(it)\n                }.apply { start() }.launch(input)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setContentDesign(design: D) {\n        suspendCoroutine\u003cUnit\u003e {\n            window.decorView.post {\n                this.design = design\n                it.resume(Unit)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\n        applyDayNight()\n\n        launch {\n            main()\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onStart() {\n        super.onStart()",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.util\n\nimport android.app.Activity\nimport android.app.Application\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.os.Build\nimport android.os.Bundle\nimport java.io.File\nimport java.util.zip.ZipFile\n\nobject ApplicationObserver {\n    private val _createdActivities: MutableSet\u003cActivity\u003e = mutableSetOf()\n    private val _visibleActivities: MutableSet\u003cActivity\u003e = mutableSetOf()\n\n    private var visibleChanged: (Boolean) -\u003e Unit = {}\n\n    private var appVisible = false\n        private set(value) {\n            if (field != value) {\n                field = value\n\n                visibleChanged(value)\n            }\n        }\n\n    val createdActivities: Set\u003cActivity\u003e\n        get() = _createdActivities\n\n    private val activityObserver = object : Application.ActivityLifecycleCallbacks {\n        @Synchronized\n        override fun onActivityCreated(activity: Activity, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n            _createdActivities.add(activity)\n        }\n\n        @Synchronized\n        override fun onActivityDestroyed(activity: Activity) {\n            _createdActivities.remove(activity)\n            _visibleActivities.remove(activity)\n            appVisible = _visibleActivities.isNotEmpty()\n        }\n\n        override fun onActivityStarted(activity: Activity) {\n            _visibleActivities.add(activity)\n            appVisible = true\n        }\n\n        override fun onActivityStopped(activity: Activity) {\n            _visibleActivities.remove(activity)\n            appVisible = _visibleActivities.isNotEmpty()\n        }\n\n        override fun onActivityPaused(activity: Activity) {}\n        override fun onActivityResumed(activity: Activity) {}\n        override fun onActivitySaveInstanceState(activity: Activity, outState: Bundle) {}\n    }\n\n    fun onVisibleChanged(visibleChanged: (Boolean) -\u003e Unit) {\n        this.visibleChanged = visibleChanged\n    }\n\n    fun attach(application: Application) {\n        application.registerActivityLifecycleCallbacks(activityObserver)\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class MainActivity : BaseActivity\u003cMainDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = MainDesign(this)\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        design.fetch()\n\n        val ticker = ticker(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(1))\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        Event.ActivityStart,\n                        Event.ServiceRecreated,\n                        Event.ClashStop, Event.ClashStart,\n                        Event.ProfileLoaded, Event.ProfileChanged -\u003e design.fetch()\n                        else -\u003e Unit\n                    }\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        MainDesign.Request.ToggleStatus -\u003e {\n                            if (clashRunning)\n                                stopClashService()\n                            else\n                                design.startClash()\n                        }\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenConnections -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ConnectionsActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProxy -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProxyActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProfiles -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProfilesActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenProviders -\u003e\n                            startActivity(ProvidersActivity::class.intent)\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenLogs -\u003e {\n                            if (LogcatService.running) {\n                                startActivity(LogcatActivity::class.intent)\n                            } else {\n                                startActivity(LogsActivity::class.intent)\n                            }\n                        }\n                        MainDesign.Request.OpenNetwork -\u003e\n                            startActivity(NetworkSettingsActivity::class.intent)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override fun onStopped(cause: String?) {\n        events.trySend(Event.ClashStop)\n\n        if (cause != null \u0026\u0026 activityStarted) {\n            launch {\n                design?.showExceptionToast(ClashException(cause))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun queryDayNight(config: Configuration = resources.configuration): DayNight {\n        return when (uiStore.darkMode) {\n            DarkMode.Auto -\u003e if (config.uiMode and Configuration.UI_MODE_NIGHT_MASK == Configuration.UI_MODE_NIGHT_YES) DayNight.Night else DayNight.Day\n            DarkMode.ForceLight -\u003e DayNight.Day\n            DarkMode.ForceDark -\u003e DayNight.Night\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun applyDayNight(config: Configuration = resources.configuration) {\n        val dayNight = queryDayNight(config)\n        when (dayNight) {\n            DayNight.Night -\u003e theme.applyStyle(R.style.AppThemeDark, true)\n            DayNight.Day -\u003e theme.applyStyle(R.style.AppThemeLight, true)\n        }\n\n        window.isAllowForceDarkCompat = false\n        window.isSystemBarsTranslucentCompat = true\n        \n        window.statusBarColor = resolveThemedColor(android.R.attr.statusBarColor)\n        window.navigationBarColor = resolveThemedColor(android.R.attr.navigationBarColor)\n\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 23) {\n            window.isLightStatusBarsCompat = resolveThemedBoolean(android.R.attr.windowLightStatusBar)\n        }\n\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 27) {\n            window.isLightNavigationBarCompat = resolveThemedBoolean(android.R.attr.windowLightNavigationBar)\n        }\n\n        this.dayNight = dayNight\n    }\n\n    enum class Event {\n        ServiceRecreated,\n        ActivityStart,\n        ActivityStop,\n        ClashStop,\n        ClashStart,\n        ProfileLoaded,\n        ProfileChanged,\n        ProfileUpdateCompleted,\n        ProfileUpdateFailed,\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.remote\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.ApkBrokenActivity\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.AppCrashedActivity\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.Global\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.store.AppStore\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.ApplicationObserver\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.verifyApk\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\n\nobject Remote {\n    val broadcasts: Broadcasts = Broadcasts(Global.application)\n    val service: Service = Service(Global.application) {\n        ApplicationObserver.createdActivities.forEach { it.finish() }\n\n        val intent = AppCrashedActivity::class.intent\n            .addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)\n\n        Global.application.startActivity(intent)\n    }\n\n    private val visible = Channel\u003cBoolean\u003e(Channel.CONFLATED)\n\n    fun launch() {\n        ApplicationObserver.attach(Global.application)\n\n        ApplicationObserver.onVisibleChanged {\n            if(it) {\n                Log.d(\"App becomes visible\")\n                service.bind()\n                broadcasts.register()\n            }\n            else {\n                Log.d(\"App becomes invisible\")\n                service.unbind()\n                broadcasts.unregister()\n            }\n        }\n\n        Global.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            verifyApp()\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun verifyApp() {\n        val context = Global.application\n        val store = AppStore(context)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.util\n\nimport androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle\nimport androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner\nimport androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleRegistry\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.NonCancellable\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\n\nclass ActivityResultLifecycle : LifecycleOwner {\n    override val lifecycle = LifecycleRegistry(this)\n\n    init {\n        lifecycle.currentState = Lifecycle.State.INITIALIZED\n    }\n\n    suspend fun \u003cT\u003e use(block: suspend (lifecycle: ActivityResultLifecycle, start: () -\u003e Unit) -\u003e T): T {\n        return try {\n            markCreated()\n\n            block(this, this::markStarted)\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                markDestroy()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun markCreated() {\n        lifecycle.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED\n    }\n\n    private fun markStarted() {\n        lifecycle.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED\n        lifecycle.currentState = Lifecycle.State.RESUMED\n    }\n\n    private fun markDestroy() {\n        lifecycle.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.clash.module\n\nimport android.app.PendingIntent\nimport android.app.Service\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationChannelCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationManagerCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.getColorCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.pendingIntentFlags\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.startForegroundCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Components\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Intents\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.R\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.StatusProvider\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel\n\nclass StaticNotificationModule(service: Service) : Module\u003cUnit\u003e(service) {\n    private val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n        .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n        .setOngoing(true)\n        .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n        .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n        .setShowWhen(false)\n        .setForegroundServiceBehavior(NotificationCompat.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_IMMEDIATE)\n        .setContentIntent(\n            PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                service,\n                R.id.nf_clash_status,\n                Intent().setComponent(Components.MAIN_ACTIVITY)\n                    .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP),\n                pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n            )\n        )\n\n    override suspend fun run() {\n        val loaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.NetworkSettingsDesign\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.store.ServiceStore\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.selects.select\n\nclass NetworkSettingsActivity : BaseActivity\u003cNetworkSettingsDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = NetworkSettingsDesign(\n            this,\n            uiStore,\n            ServiceStore(this),\n            clashRunning,\n        )\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        Event.ClashStart, Event.ClashStop, Event.ServiceRecreated -\u003e\n                            recreate()\n                        else -\u003e Unit\n                    }\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        NetworkSettingsDesign.Request.StartAccessControlList -\u003e\n                            startActivity(AccessControlActivity::class.intent)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat\n\nimport android.app.ActivityThread\nimport android.app.Application\nimport android.graphics.drawable.AdaptiveIconDrawable\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Drawable\nimport android.os.Build\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\n\nval Application.currentProcessName: String\n    get() {\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 28)\n            return Application.getProcessName()\n\n        return try {\n            ActivityThread.currentProcessName()\n        } catch (throwable: Throwable) {\n            Log.w(\"Resolve process name: $throwable\")\n\n            packageName\n        }\n    }\n\nfun Drawable.foreground(): Drawable {\n    if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= Build.VERSION_CODES.O \u0026\u0026\n        this is AdaptiveIconDrawable \u0026\u0026 this.background == null\n    ) {\n        return this.foreground\n    }\n    return this\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            )\n    }\n\n    private fun showNotification() {\n        val notification = NotificationCompat\n            .Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)\n            .setSmallIcon(com.github.kr328.clash.service.R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n            .setColor(getColorCompat(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.color.color_clash_light))\n            .setContentTitle(getString(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.string.clash_logcat))\n            .setContentText(getString(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.string.running))\n            .setContentIntent(\n                PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                    this,\n                    R.id.nf_logcat_status,\n                    LogcatActivity::class.intent\n                        .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP),\n                    pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n                )\n            )\n            .build()\n\n        startForegroundCompat(R.id.nf_logcat_status, notification)\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val CHANNEL_ID = \"clash_logcat_channel\"\n        private const val CACHE_CAPACITY = 128\n\n        var running: Boolean = false\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    mod event_handlers {\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n        use crate::module::lightweight;\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n        use crate::utils::window_manager::WindowManager;\n        use crate::{\n            config::Config,\n            core::{self, handle, hotkey},\n            process::AsyncHandler,\n        };\n        use clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging};\n        use tauri::AppHandle;\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n        use tauri::Manager as _;\n\n        pub fn handle_ready_resumed(_app_handle: \u0026AppHandle) {\n            if handle::Handle::global().is_exiting() {\n                logging!(debug, Type::System, \"应用正在退出，跳过处理\");\n                return;\n            }\n\n            logging!(info, Type::System, \"应用就绪\");\n            handle::Handle::global().init();\n\n            #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n            if let Some(window) = _app_handle.get_webview_window(\"main\") {\n                let _ = window.set_title(\"Clash Verge\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n        pub async fn handle_reopen(has_visible_windows: bool) {\n            handle::Handle::global().init();\n\n            if lightweight::is_in_lightweight_mode() {\n                lightweight::exit_lightweight_mode().await;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if !has_visible_windows {\n                handle::Handle::global().set_activation_policy_regular();\n                let _ = WindowManager::show_main_window().await;\n            }\n        }\n\n        pub fn handle_window_close(api: \u0026tauri::WindowEvent)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    }\n\n    override suspend fun run() = coroutineScope {\n        var shouldUpdate = service.getSystemService\u003cPowerManager\u003e()?.isInteractive ?: true\n\n        val screenToggle = receiveBroadcast(false, Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            addAction(Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_ON)\n            addAction(Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_OFF)\n        }\n\n        val profileLoaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED)\n        }\n\n        val ticker = ticker(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(1))\n\n        while (true) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                screenToggle.onReceive {\n                    when (it.action) {\n                        Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_ON -\u003e\n                            shouldUpdate = true\n                        Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_OFF -\u003e\n                            shouldUpdate = false\n                    }\n                }\n                profileLoaded.onReceive {\n                    builder.setContentTitle(StatusProvider.currentProfile ?: \"Not selected\")\n                }\n                if (shouldUpdate) {\n                    ticker.onReceive {\n                        update()\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.SettingsDesign\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.selects.select\n\nclass SettingsActivity : BaseActivity\u003cSettingsDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = SettingsDesign(this)\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive {\n\n                }\n                design.requests.onReceive {\n                    when (it) {\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartApp -\u003e\n                            startActivity(AppSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                        SettingsDesign.Request.StartNetwork -\u003e\n                            startActivity(NetworkSettingsActivity::class.intent)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.versionCodeCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.AppCrashedDesign\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.log.SystemLogcat\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\n\nclass AppCrashedActivity : BaseActivity\u003cAppCrashedDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val design = AppCrashedDesign(this)\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        val packageInfo = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            packageManager.getPackageInfo(packageName, 0)\n        }\n\n        Log.i(\"App version: versionName = ${packageInfo.versionName} versionCode = ${packageInfo.versionCodeCompat}\")\n\n        val logs = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            SystemLogcat.dumpCrash()\n        }\n\n        design.setAppLogs(logs)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            events.receive()\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\nclass ExternalControlActivity : Activity(), CoroutineScope by MainScope() {\n    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\n\n        when(intent.action) {\n            Intent.ACTION_VIEW -\u003e {\n                val uri = intent.data ?: return finish()\n                val url = uri.getQueryParameter(\"url\") ?: return finish()\n\n                launch {\n                    val uuid = withProfile {\n                        val type = when (uri.getQueryParameter(\"type\")?.lowercase(Locale.getDefault())) {\n                            \"url\" -\u003e Profile.Type.Url\n                            \"file\" -\u003e Profile.Type.File\n                            else -\u003e Profile.Type.Url\n                        }\n                        val name = uri.getQueryParameter(\"name\") ?: getString(R.string.new_profile)\n\n                        create(type, name).also {\n                            patch(it, name, url, 0)\n                        }\n                    }\n                    startActivity(PropertiesActivity::class.intent.setUUID(uuid))\n                    finish()\n                }\n            }\n\n            Intents.ACTION_TOGGLE_CLASH -\u003e if(Remote.broadcasts.clashRunning) {\n                stopClash()\n            }\n            else {\n                startClash()\n            }\n\n            Intents.ACTION_START_CLASH -\u003e if(!Remote.broadcasts.clashRunning) {\n                startClash()\n            }\n            else {\n                Toast.makeText(this, R.string.external_control_started, Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()\n            }\n\n            Intents.ACTION_STOP_CLASH -\u003e if(Remote.broadcasts.clashRunning) {\n                stopClash()\n            }\n            else {\n                Toast.makeText(this, R.string.external_control_stopped, Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()\n            }\n        }\n        return finish()\n    }\n\n    private fun startClash() {\n//        if (currentProfile == null) {\n//            Toast.makeText(this, R.string.no_profile_selected, Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()\n//            return\n//        }\n        val vpnRequest = startClashService()",
